description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, shingle-clad roof with a prominent stone chimney at the peak, giving it a rustic and storybook appearance. The front facade includes a small covered porch supported by stone columns, a wooden door, and a decorative sign with a hat motif, suggesting a whimsical or themed residence. The exterior walls are finished with matching shingle tiles, and the base of the structure is accented with rough stonework. A single arched window with wooden shutters is set into the upper portion of the front and side elevations, providing natural light to the upper level. The roof extends asymmetrically, creating a sheltered entryway and a visually dynamic silhouette. The overall design combines elements of cottage and fantasy architecture, making it stand out in an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A whimsical house with a steep shingle roof, stone chimney, and a small covered porch supported by stone columns. Features include an arched window, wooden door, and decorative sign, all set in a rustic, storybook style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, wooden door, stone columns, and a decorative sign with a hat motif.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the arched window, stone chimney, and the continuation of the shingle roof with less visible entry details.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the steep, shingle-clad roof and the stone chimney at the peak.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the arched window, shingle siding, and the asymmetrical roof extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a single arched window
attribute_entryway_design: Small covered porch with stone columns, wooden door, decorative sign, and overhanging roof
